title: Too many digits for 32 bit -1
code_blocks:
git clone git@github.com:bespoke-silicon-group/basejump_stl.git
cd basejump_stl

sv2v -Ibsg_misc \
    bsg_misc/bsg_circular_ptr.sv \
    bsg_dataflow/bsg_round_robin_n_to_1.sv \
    bsg_dataflow/bsg_round_robin_1_to_n.sv \
    bsg_misc/bsg_crossbar_o_by_i.sv \
    bsg_misc/bsg_round_robin_arb.sv \
    bsg_misc/bsg_mux_one_hot.sv \
    bsg_dataflow/bsg_serial_in_parallel_out_full.sv > rtl.sv2v.v

yosys -p '
read_verilog rtl.sv2v.v;
prep;
write_verilog -noexpr -noattr -simple-lhs synth.v
'
